title: calamagrostis neglecta var. micrantha
intro: Calamagrostis neglecta var. micrantha, also known as a variant of the small panicle grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Calamagrostis neglecta var. micrantha is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
